style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. In the centre, a two-faced chess clock; the left face labelled HUMAN, the right face labelled AI, with a small arrow showing the turn passing from one to the other. Above it, a single board step with two small tokens handing a baton back and forth, captioned HAND OFF WITHIN A STEP. To one side, a small raised-hand icon labelled RAISE A HAND, NO PENALTY, and below it a small stop icon labelled BLOCK, A SMALL PENALTY. A caption reads THE CLOCK SHOWS WHO HELD THE WORK. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond simple tokens.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

In the centre, a two-faced chess clock; the left face labelled HUMAN, the right face labelled AI, with a small arrow showing the turn passing from one to the other. Above it, a single board step with two small tokens handing a baton back and forth, captioned HAND OFF WITHIN A STEP.
